Purpose: Show which committee/body owns which finance operations decisions.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Personnel Committee, Finance Committee, Nominating Committee, Deacons, Pastor, Treasurer, Bookkeeper, Congregation. Operations Manual: Yes. Open questions: Which cells require bylaw confirmation or church practice confirmation?. File name: docs/governance/future-governance-expansion.md. Type of document: Parking lot / governance review note. Purpose: Preserve future review questions for Benevolence, other committee spending, Deacon counsel, and congregational approval paths.. Current status: Parking Lot. Related committee/body: Pastor, Deacons, Finance Committee, Personnel Committee, Nominating Committee, Congregation if required. Operations Manual: Maybe. Open questions: Which future issues should wait until Bookkeeper hiring and immediate financial controls are stable?. File name: docs/roles/treasurer-governance-role.md. Type of document: Role description. Purpose: Draft the elected Treasurer / Financial Officer role focused on governance, accountability, reporting, and Finance Committee coordination.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Treasurer, Finance Committee, Nominating Committee, Congregation. Operations Manual: Yes. Open questions: Should day-to-day bookkeeping be optional, interim-only, or removed from this role?. File name: docs/roles/bookkeeper-financial-administrator-job-description.md. Type of document: Job description. Purpose: Draft operational paid Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator duties, qualifications, software responsibilities, and accountability.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Personnel Committee, Finance Committee. Operations Manual: Maybe. Open questions: What compensation, hours, classification, supervision, and Finance Committee duty/control input are needed before hiring?. File name: docs/roles/bookkeeper-hiring-process.md. Type of document: Hiring process / checklist. Purpose: Provide hiring checklist, interview guide, reference questions, and candidate evaluation rubric for the authorized paid Bookkeeper role.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Personnel Committee, Finance Committee. Operations Manual: No. Open questions: Who will serve as hiring lead, interview coordinator, reference checker, and Finance workflow reviewer?. File name: docs/roles/bookkeeper-job-application.md. Type of document: Job application. Purpose: Provide a draft application for a Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator in the style of existing KBC forms.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Personnel Committee. Operations Manual: No. Open questions: What final application language and background-check requirements are needed?. File name: docs/roles/interim-treasurer-role.md. Type of document: Interim role description. Purpose: Define temporary coverage expectations while Treasurer role is vacant or transitioning.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Nominating Committee, Deacons, Congregation. Operations Manual: Maybe. Open questions: What is the term, authority, and reporting path for the interim Treasurer?. File name: docs/roles/treasurer-vs-bookkeeper-duty-split.md. Type of document: Duty split analysis. Purpose: Compare current Treasurer duties with proposed Treasurer, Bookkeeper, committee, and outside vendor responsibilities.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Personnel Committee, Treasurer, Bookkeeper, Nominating Committee. Operations Manual: Maybe. Open questions: Which duty split changes require bylaw review, committee approval, or church vote?. File name: docs/policies/spending-authority-policy.md. Type of document: Policy. Purpose: Define spending categories, approval paths, and placeholder thresholds.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Congregation if vote required. Operations Manual: Yes. Open questions: What dollar thresholds and church vote triggers apply?. File name: docs/policies/reimbursement-policy.md. Type of document: Policy. Purpose: Define reimbursement documentation, routine expense treatment, pre-approval needs, and review process.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee. Operations Manual: Yes. Open questions: Who approves routine reimbursements, and what submission deadline applies?. File name: docs/policies/credit-card-policy.md. Type of document: Policy.
